LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RON MIFSUD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ABSENT PLAINTIFF'S PROOF THAT SHE GAVE PROPER NOTICE TO THE COURT THAT SHE WAS APPEARING TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S ACTION IS AN IMPROPER COLLATERAL ATTACK ON THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY, IF ANY, IS TO SEEK TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Continued To Jun-08-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Monica Oca, Esq., of the Law Offices of Rodel Rodis, Tel. 415.334.7800, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.
No other Appearance.

RULING: Absent plaintiff's proof that she gave proper notice to the court that she was appearing to contest the tentative ruling, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RON MIFSUD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's action is an improper collateral attack on the small claims judgment. Plaintiff's remedy, if any, is to seek to vacate the judgment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
